justification: This deduction (VM-90332, $12,000) is a duplicate of a claim already settled and paid in full. Settlement history record SH-2025-Q4-011 (settled 2025-09-22) documents that invoice VM-88214 / promo SLOT-VM-2025-09 — for new item slotting of SKU MF-BV-102 — was approved and paid at $12,000 in full. The current deduction references the identical invoice (VM-88214), identical promo reference (SLOT-VM-2025-09), and identical SKU (MF-BV-102) for the identical dollar amount. Per contract section 4.2, slotting is a one-time charge per item; no additional slotting may be deducted for the same item absent new written authorization. A search of all active ValuMax promotions for MF-BV-102 returns zero results, confirming no new authorization exists. The deduction is denied in full as a duplicate of an already-settled claim. Meridian reserves the right to recover this deduction as an invalid offset per contract section 3.3 if ValuMax does not reverse it.
